name: lm-resizer
install_doc: cargo build --release  # no crate published; build from source. Then: lm-resizer install --client claude --scope project
notes: Multi-surface Rust context compression engine. Mechanisms: (1) PostToolUse hook for Claude Code and Codex that captures command output and records savings; (2) 'lm-resizer exec' wrapper for agents to receive filtered output; (3) MCP stdio server exposing compression/retrieval/stats tools; (4) HTTP proxy compressing OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible provider payloads (validated vs Mistral/Ollama/DeepSeek/OpenRouter/Grok). Cache-safe: compacts tool OUTPUT, not conversation history. Targets Claude Code and Codex primarily. Features: JSON minification, log template compression, diff offload, query-aware row retention (biases surviving rows toward current question), CCR offload to SQLite with recovery. Optional ML content classification via Google Magika (ONNX, opt-in build flag). No telemetry. Companions: Code Explorer (codebase map) + lm-resizer + Code Buddy orchestrator.
